59.5: Dizef serpan, zot finn fer eklo. Zot finn tis latwal zarenie. Seki manz zot dizef, li mor. Dizef ki kraze, enn serpan pou sort ladan.
59.6: Zot latwal napa pou vinn enn linz e zot pa pou kapav kouver ar zot louvraz. Zot louvraz se louvraz lemal, e laviolans dan zot lame.
59.7: Zot lipie galoup kot lemal. Zot prese pou zot fann disan inosan. Zot bann panse bann panse lemal. Kot zot pase, devastasion ek ravaz.
59.8: Zot pa konn sime lape, pena lazistis lor zot larout. Zot bann santie napa drwat. Seki bat mem larout ar zot, pa pou konn lape.
59.9: Ala kifer lalwa finn vinn lwin ar nou, e lazistis napa ariv ziska kot nou. Nou pe esper lalimier, ala marenwar; pe espere pou gagn klarte, me nou pe mars dan nwar.
59.10: Nou pe tatone kouma bann aveg kot enn miray. Kouma dir pena lizie, nou pe tatone. Gran midi, nou pe tom-tonbe koumadir aswar finn vini. Nou koumadir bann mor ki viv ar dimoun ki an bonn sante.
59.11: Nou pe grogne, koumadir bann lours. Kouma bann pizon, nou nek plengne. Nou pe atann lazistis, nanye mem! Nou pe atann nou delivrans, me li res lwin ar nou.
59.12: Parski nou bann krim kont twa, zot boukou. Nou bann pese temwagn kont nou. Wi, nou bann krim divan nou, e nou rekonet nou bann fot.
59.13: Nou revolte, nou koz manti kont LESEGNER, nou aret swiv nou Bondie; nou koz brit, nou fer marday, nou maniganse, nou kalkile dan leker, nou koz manti.
59.14: Lalwa finn gagn pouse e lazistis finn bat karte. Wi, laverite finn tonbe lor laplas piblik, e seki drwat pa finn kapav rantre.
59.15: Laverite finn disparet. Seki res lwin ar lemal pe gagn maltrete. LESEGNER finn trouve ki sa pa bon, parski nepli ena lalwa.
59.16: Li finn trouve ki pa ti ena personn. Li finn sagrin parski personn pa finn intervenir. Lerla so prop lebra finn sov li, e so lazistis finn tini li.
59.17: Li finn met lazistis lor li kouma enn boukliye. Lor so latet, elmet delivrans. Li finn met lor li linz vanzans. Li finn anvlop li ar zalouzi, kouma nou met enn manto.
59.18: Li donn sakenn seki li merite: laraz pou so bann adverser, pinision pou so bann lennmi. Li donn bann zil seki zot merite.
59.19: Depi lwes, zot pou ena respe pou LESEGNER, e ziska les, zot pou respekte so laglwar, parski li pou vini kouma enn larivier, enn kouran ki divan LESEGNER pe pouse.
59.20: “Enn sover pou vinn pou Sion, e pou bann abitan Zakob ki nepli revolte.” LESEGNER deklare.
59.21: “Samem mo lalians ar zot,” LESEGNER finn dir: “Se mo lespri ki lor twa. Se mo bann parol ki mo finn met dan to labous. Zot napa pou al lwin ar to lalev, ek labous to bann desandan, ek labous desandan to bann desandan.” Samem LESEGNER pe dir, aster e pou touzour.

60.1: Dibout! Briye! Parski to lalimier finn arive, e laglwar LESEGNER finn leve pou twa.
60.2: Wi, ala marenwar finn kouver later, e teneb lor bann pep. Lor twa LESEGNER ape leve, e to finn kapav trouv so laglwar.
60.3: Bann pei pou mars dan to lalimier, e bann lerwa, dan klarte to soley ki ape leve.
60.4: Lev lizie otour twa, gete: zot tou finn rasanble, zot pe vinn kot twa. To bann garson sort lwin; zot pe vini, e to pe port to bann tifi lor laans.
60.5: Lerla to pou trouve, e to pou briye. To leker pou vibre, li pou bate ar lazwa, parski bann trezor lamer pou ariv kot twa, rises bann pei pou vinn kot twa.
60.6: To pei pou kouver ar boukou samo. Zenn-zenn troupo depi Madiann ek Efa, Zot tou pou vinn depi Saba, pou amenn lor ek lansan, e pou proklam louanz LESEGNER.
60.7: Tou bann troupo Kedar pou rasanble divan twa. Bann belie Nebayot pou servi twa. Zot pou mont lor mo lotel avek mo faver. Wi, mo pou onor mo zoli Tanp.
60.8: Ki sa bann-la sa? Zot anvole kouma niaz, koumadir bann pizon ki pe al dan zot nik.
60.9: Dan momem, ki bann zil pe espere. Bann bato Tarsis ki divan pou ramenn depi lwin to bann garson, ar zot larzan ek zot lor, akoz nom LESEGNER to Bondie, akoz Bondie Izrael, ki finn glorifie twa.
60.10: Bann garson etranze pou rekonstrir to bann sitadel, e zot bann lerwa pou servi twa. Parski dan mo koler mo ti bat twa, me dan mo lamour mo finn gagn konpasion pou twa.
60.11: To bann laport pou res ouver pou touzour. Lanwit-lizour, napa pou ferm zot, pou ki zot kapav amenn kot twa trezor bann pei e kondir zot bann lerwa.
60.12: Parski pei ek rwayom ki napa servi twa pou detrir, pou devaste.
60.13: Laglwar Liban pou vinn kot twa. Pie sipre, platann ek bwi, zot tou ansam, pou dekor landrwa kot mo tanp ete. Mo pou glorifie landrwa kot mo poz mo lipie.
60.14: Desandan bann ki ti imilie twa, Zot pou koste kot twa, Zot pou vinn kot twa, zot pou kourbe divan twa. Tou bann ki ti mepriz twa, zot pou prostern divan to lipie. Zot pou apel twa: “Lavil LESEGNER”, “Sion ki Sin dan Izrael”.
60.15: Lontan, to ti abandone, air e deteste, e personn napa ti get twa. Me aster, mo pou fer twa vinn enn fierte pou touzour; Enn lazwa, zenerasion apre zenerasion.
60.16: To pou bwar dile bann pei, to pou devor rises bann lerwa. To pou kone ki momem LESEGNER ki pe sov twa, momem to sover ki for dan Zakob.
60.17: Olie bronz, mo pou fer bann-la amenn lor. Olie feray, mo pou fer bann-la amenn larzan. Dan plas dibwa, pou gagn bronz; e dan plas ros, pou gagn feray. Mo pou fer lape pou protez twa, lazistis pou gouvern twa.
60.18: Pou nepli tann koz laviolans dan to pei. Dezas ek ravaz, pou nepli dan to bann frontier. To pou apel to bann miray: “Delivrans”, e to bann laport “Louanz”.
60.19: Soley pou nepli to lalimier, lizour ek klarte lalinn pou nepli donn twa lalimier. LESEGNER pou vinn to lalimier eternel; to Bondie, pou vinn to splander.
60.20: To soley pou nepli kasiet, e to lalinn napa pou disparet, parski LESEGNER pou enn lalimier eternel pou twa, e zour kot to ti an-dey pou fini.
60.21: To pep, zot tou ki fer lazistis, pou gagn later pou touzour. Zot mem lagrin ki mo finn plante, louvraz mo lame pou glorifie mwa.
60.22: Bann ki pli tipti, pou vinn enn group mil dimoun. Bann ki pli feb, pou vinn enn pei bien pwisan. Mwa, LESEGNER, mo pa pou tarde pou realiz tousala dan so lepok.

61.1: Lespri LESEGNER lor mwa parski LESEGNER finn konsakre mwa, pou anons bann pov bon nouvel. Li finn anvoy mwa pou geri bann ki zot leker finn kase, pou proklam liberasion pou bann ki dan kaptivite; e liberte pou bann ki dan prizon.
61.2: Pou proklam enn lane kot LESEGNER pou akord so faver, ek enn zour kot nou Bondie pou pous vanzans, pou konsol tou bann ki an-dey;
61.3: tou bann ki an-dey dan Sion, pou donn zot enn kouronn, dan plas lasann; delwil lazwa, dan plas enn linz dey; enn manto lazwa, dan plas enn lespri dekouraze; pou ki kapav apel zot “Pie Lazistis”, ki LESEGNER finn plante pou montre so laglwar.
61.4: Zot pou rekonstrir bann vie rwinn. Zot pou relev bann vie landrwa kot tou ti fini kraze. Zot pou renouvel bann lavil ki finn tom an rwinn, depi boukou zenerasion.
61.5: Bann etranze pou dibout, pou vey zot bann troupo. Bann ki sort deor, pou labour zot later e zot bann pie rezin.
61.6: Me zot, pou apel zot pret LESEGNER serviter Bondie. Zot pou manz trezor bann nasion, e bann trezor-la pou fer zot fierte.
61.7: Zot nepli pou gagn laont, e zot nepli pou konn dezoner. Dan zot pei, zot larises pou double, e zot lazwa pou dire pou touletan.
61.8: Parski mwa LESEGNER, mo kontan seki drwat. Mo pa kontan vol ek linzistis. Mo pou donn zot rekonpans zot merite, e mo pou fer enn lalians eternel avek zot.
61.9: Pou konn zot bann desandan dan tou bann pei, e zot bann zanfan, omilie bann pep. Tou bann ki pou trouv zot, pou rekonet ki zot enn desandans ki LESEGNER finn beni.
61.10: Lazwa, bel lazwa, mo pou trouve dan LESEGNER. Mo nam pou trouv so kontantman dan mo Bondie, parski li finn abiy mwa ar linz delivrans, li finn anvlop mwa dan manto lazistis. kouma nouvo marye port enn girland, kouma enn pret so kouronn lor so latet, kouma nouvel marye port so bann bizou,
61.11: kouma later fer so lagrin pouse, e kouma enn zardin fer so bann semans zerme, LESEGNER Bondie pou fer lazistis ek louanz zerme divan tou bann pei.

62.1: Akoz lamour ki mo ena pou Sion, mo pa pou res trankil. Akoz lamour ki mo ena pou Zerizalem, mo pa pou repoze ziska seki li regagn so loner, parey kouma enn reyon lalimier, e so delivrans kouma enn flanbo ki pe brile.
62.2: Lerla, bann nasion pou trouv to lazistis, e tou bann lerwa pou dekouver to laglwar. Labous LESEGNER pou donn twa enn nouvo nom.
62.3: To pou enn zoli-zoli kouronn dan lame LESEGNER, enn diadem rwayal dan lame to Bondie.
62.4: Nepli pou dir twa: “Abandone”, e pou nepli dir to later: “Dezolasion”. Me pou apel twa: “Tomem mo lazwa,” e to later: “Tomem mo madam.” Parski LESEGNER pou trouv so lazwa dan twa, e pou marye ar to later.
62.5: Parey kouma enn zennzan marye ar enn zennfi, seki finn kre twa-la pou marye avek twa. Parey kouma enn nouvo marye ena lazwa pou so lamarye; Bondie pou ena lazwa pou twa.
62.6: Lor bann miray Zerizalem, mo finn met bann gard. Lanwit, lizour zame zot napa pou res trankil. Zot mazinn LESEGNER, zot pa pou pran repo.
62.7: Pa les li repoze, ziska ki li fer Zerizalem vinn for, e fer li vinn renome partou lor later.
62.8: LESEGNER finn fer serman ar so lame drwat e ar so lebra pwisan: “Mo pou nepli les bann etranze pran dible ki to finn plante. Bann etranze pou nepli bwar to divin, fri to travay.
62.9: Me bann ki rekolte dible pou manze e pou loue LESEGNER. Bann ki rekolte rezin pou bwar divin dan lakour mo tanp.
62.10: Pase, pas par laport! Tras sime, mo pep! Konstrir, konstrir sime-la! Tir bann ros-la! Lev drapo lor bann pep.
62.11: Ala LESEGNER pe fer tann so lavwa ziska dan bout later. Dir tifi Sion: “Ala to delivrans pe vini, LESEGNER pou sov twa, li pe amenn avek li bann dimoun ki li finn delivre.”
62.12: Pou apel zot: “Lepep sin”, “Bann ki LESEGNER finn libere”. E twa, pou apel twa: “Dezire”, “Lavil ki pa finn abandone”.

63.1: Kisann-la vinn depi Edom, depi Bokra, ar so linz rouz, fier dan so zoli batman, ki pe drese dan so gran pwisans? Momem sa, ki pe proklam lazistis, ki ena pwisans pou sov zot.
63.2: Kifer to linz rouz? Kifer to finn abiy kouma seki kraz rezin dan preswar?
63.3: Wi, mo finn travay dan preswar e parmi bann pep, personn pa ti ar mwa. Mo finn kraz zot dan mo koler. Mo finn pil lor zot dan mo laraz. Zot disan finn tas mo bann linz, e finn sali tou mo bann zafer.
63.4: Parski zour revans lamem, dan mo leker. Lane finn arive, pou mo liber mo pep.
63.5: Mo finn gete: pena personn pou ed mwa. Mo ti rod led: pena personn pou ankouraz mwa. Lerla mo prop lebra finn vinn sov mwa. Mo laraz finn donn mwa kouraz.
63.6: Mo finn kraz bann pep dan mo koler. Dan mo laraz, mo finn soul zot e mo finn fer zot disan fane lor later.
63.7: Fidelite LESEGNER mo pou rapel. Louanz pou LESEGNER, pou tou seki LESEGNER finn akonpli pou nou, pou so gran bonte pou lakaz Izrael, pou tou seki li finn akonpli dan so mizerikord, pou labondans so fidelite.
63.8: Parski li dir: “Wi, zotmem mo pep, bann garson ki pa koz manti.” Lerla, li finn vinn zot sover.
63.9: Dan tou zot langwas, li pa finn anvoy okenn mesaze pou sov zot. Dan so lamour e so konpasion, limem ki finn raset zot, e ki finn sarye zot, e ki finn port zot, tou lezour dan lepase.
63.10: Me zot, zot finn revolte, e zot finn fer so lespri sin sagrin. Alor li finn sanze, li finn vinn enn lennmi pou zot. Limem ki finn konbat kont zot.
63.11: Li finn rapel letan lontan, Moiz so serviter. Kot li ete, seki ti sov zot depi lamer, avek bann berze so troupo? Kot li ete, seki ti met dan zot so lespri sin;
63.12: seki ti akonpagn lame drwat Moiz ar so lebra pwisan? Kisann-la ti fann lamer divan zot, pou li fer so nom vinn renome pou touzour?
63.13: Ler li ti fer zot travers fon lamer, kouma enn souval dan dezer, zot pa ti tonbe.
63.14: Zot ti kouma enn troupo ki pe desann dan vale. Lespri LESEGNER ti pe kondir zot, pou donn zot repo. Koumsamem to finn kondir to pep, e sanktifie to nom.
63.15: Get depi lesiel, gete. Depi to zoli lakaz sin. Kot to pasion ek to lafors? Kot to konpasion? Pa ignor nou.
63.16: Parski tomem nou papa, parski Abraam pa finn konn nou, e Izrael pa finn rekonet nou, twa “LESEGNER nou papa ki liber nou”, samem to nom depi touzour.
63.17: Kifer SEGNER, to les nou elwagne ar to bann sime; to rann nou leker dir, lwin ar to lakrint? Revini akoz to bann serviter, akoz to pep, to leritaz.
63.18: Pou tigit letan, to pep sin finn profite. Nou bann lennmi finn kraz to Tanp.
63.19: Depi bien lontan, nou finn vinn enn bann ki to nepli gouverne, e ki nepli port to nom. Ti pou bon si to ti desir lesiel, to desann; divan twa, montagn ti pou tranble.

64.1: Desir lesiel, desann! Bann montagn ava tranble divan to prezans.
64.2: Kouma dife bril fatak, e fer dilo bwi, fer to bann adverser konn to nom. Divan twa, bann pei pou tranble.
64.3: Ler to ti fer bann kiksoz terib ki nou pa ti pe atann; to ti desann, e bann montagn ti tranble divan twa.
64.4: Zame personn pa ti kone, zame zorey pa ti tande, lizie zame pa ti trouv enn lot bondie apart twa ki azir koumsa pou seki kont lor li.
64.5: To finn mars avek bann ki fer to volonte, e ki fer li ar lazwa, e ki swiv sime ki to finn trase. Si to finn ankoler, se parski nou finn fer pese. Me lor to bann sime, nou gagn nou delivrans pou touzour.
64.6: Nou tou, nou finn fer pese, e nou bann bon aksion kouma enn linz tase ar disan. Nou tou, nou fletri kouma feyaz, e nou bann fot pe fer nou balote kouma dan divan.
64.7: Personn nepli kriy to nom, personn nepli oule atas li avek twa; parski to finn kasiet to figir lwin ar nou, e to finn les nou anba pouvwar nou bann fot.
64.8: Aster SEGNER, tomem nou papa; nou, nou larzil. Twa, to fasonn nou, e nou tou, nou louvraz to lame.
64.9: SEGNER, napa ankoler tro boukou, napa rapel nou fot touletan. konsider nou tou kouma to pep.
64.10: To bann lavil sin finn vinn dezer, Sion finn vinn dezer. Zerizalem, enn landrwa dezolasion.
64.11: Nou zoli lakaz sin, kot nou bann zanset ti loue twa, finn vinn labrez dife, e tou nou bann kiksoz ki ena valer finn devaste.
64.12: Eski divan tousala, to pou res indiferan SEGNER? To pou res trankil e les nou sibir sa kalite santans la?

65.1: Mo finn les bann ki pa ti pe konsilte mwa rod mwa. Mo finn les bann ki pa ti pe rod mwa trouv mwa. Mo finn dir enn pei ki pa ti pe kriy mo nom: “Ala mo la! Ala mo la!”
65.2: Toulezour, mo finn donn lame enn pep rebel, bann ki pe mars lor enn sime ki pa bon, ki nek swiv zot panse,
65.3: enn pep, ale-vini, ki nek fronte mem. Zot fer sakrifis dan bann zardin, zot bril lansan divan gardien lakour.
65.4: Bann ki asiz dan tonbo, e pas lanwit dan bann landrwa sekre; bann ki manz pork, tou zot bann resipian finn vinn inpir.
65.5: Lerla zot dir ar lezot: “Pa koste ar mwa, pa tous mwa, parski mo tro sin pou twa.” Sa bann kiksoz la fer lafime sort dan mo nene, dife mo koler brile toutlazourne.
65.6: Alalila, enn kiksoz ki finn ekrir divan mwa. Mo pa pou res trankil. Non, mo pou rande, e mo pou regle zot kont.
65.7: Zot pou peye pou zot bann fot ek fot zot bann zanset ansam, LESEGNER finn dir. Zot ki ti pe bril lansan lor bann montagn e ki ti pe defie mwa lor bann kolinn, mo pou fer zot rann kont pou tou zot bann move aksion.
65.8: Ala seki LESEGNER pe dir: “Ler gagn zoli grap rezin ranpli ar zi, bann la dir: “Napa kraz li, parski enn benediksion sa. Koumsamem mo pou fer avek mo bann serviter, mo pa pou detrir zot.
65.9: Mo pou fer enn desandans sorti dan Zakob, e enn eritie sorti dan Zida. Bann ki mo finn swazire, pou erit mo montagn. Labamem, mo bann serviter pou reste.
65.10: Pei Saron pou vinn enn patiraz pou bann brebi; Vale Akor, enn lanklo pou bann bef; pou mo pep ki finn rod mwa.
65.11: Me zot ki abandonn LESEGNER, bann ki bliye mo montagn sin, bann ki dres enn latab pou Gad, ki plin Meni ar divin melanze;
65.12: mo pou regle zot kont ar lepe. Zot tou, zot pou ploy zot zenou pou ki masakre zot, parski mo finn apel zot, e zot pa finn reponn. Mo finn koze, e zot pa finn ekoute. Zot finn fer seki pa bon, e seki pa fer mwa kontan, samem zot finn swazir.
65.13: Akoz samem, ala LESEGNER Bondie pe dir: “Ala mo bann serviter pou manze, me zot, zot pou gagn fin. Ala mo bann serviter pou bwar, me zot, zot pou gagn swaf. Ala mo bann serviter pou dan lazwa, me zot, zot pou dan laont.
65.14: Alalila: mo bann serviter pou kriy avek lazwa dan zot leker; me zot, zot pou kriye avek soufrans dan zot leker; zot pou irle avek langwas dan zot leker!
65.15: Bann dimoun ki mo finn swazir pou servi zot nom kouma enn malediksion, e zot pou dir: “LESEGNER Bondie pou kondann twa amor”. Me li pou donn enn lot nom so bann serviter.
65.16: Seki rod benediksion lor later pou gagn benediksion ar nou Bondie ki fidel; e bann ki fer serman lor later, pou fer serman lor so nom. Zot pou bliye zot bann premie soufrans, Mo finn met tousala lwin ar mwa.
65.17: Ala mo pe kre enn nouvo lesiel ek enn nouvo later. Pou nepli rapel bann premie kiksoz, e zot pou nepli pez lour dan leker.
65.18: Me rant dan lazwa, exprim zot kontantman pou touzour, parski momem ki pe kre Zerizalem, enn lazwa! E so pep, ranpli ar kontantman!
65.19: Mo pou met mo lazwa dan Zerizalem. Mo pou met mo kontantman dan mo pep. Pou nepli tann plore ni kriye dan Zerizalem.
65.20: Laba, pou nepli gagn enn ti baba ki mor apre de-trwa zour. Pa pou ena gran dimoun ki pa pou viv lontan. Parski seki pli zenn pou mor laz sant-an. Si arive mor avan sant-an, savedir li finn modi.
65.21: Zot pou aranz bann lakaz, e zot pou res ladan. Zot pou plant pie rezin, e zot pou manz so bann fri.
65.22: Zot pou nepli konstrir pou ki enn lot reste. Zot pou nepli plante pou ki enn lot manze. Mo pep pou parey kouma bann pie ki ena so sezon. Bann ki mo finn swazire pou profit louvraz zot lame.
65.23: Zot pa pou travay dir pou nanye. Zot nepli pou akouse dan dezolasion; parski zot pou enn desandans ki beni dan LESEGNER, zot, e zot bann zanfan avek zot.
65.24: Lerla, avan ki zot apel mwa, mwa mo pou fini reponn. Zot pa pou ankor fini koze, ki mo pou fini tande.
65.25: Loulou ek agno pou manz ansam. Kouma enn sel, lion ek bef pou manz lapay. Serpan pou manz lapousier. Zot pa pou fer dimal. Zot pa pou kraz nanye lor mo montagn sin. LESEGNER finn koze.

66.1: Ala seki LESEGNER pe dir: “Lesiel, mo tronn sa. Later, kouma enn eskabo anba mo lipie. Ki sa lakaz ki zot pou konstrir pou mwa la? Ki sa landrwa kot mo pou repoze la?
66.2: Tou sa bann kiksoz la, se mo lame ki finn fer sa; Alor, tou sa bann kiksoz-la zot pou mwa. Me mo pou pran kont bann malere, bann ki zot lespri finn kase, e bann ki pou respekte mo parol.” Samem ki LESEGNER pe dir.
66.3: Zot donn enn bef an sakrifis, me anmemtan, zot pe touy dimoun. Zot sakrifie enn agno, me anmemtan, zot pe kas likou lisien. Zot pe ofer mwa enn lofrand, me anmemtan, zot pe fann disan pork. Zot pe bril lansan pou mwa, me anmemtan, zot pe ador idol. Zot finn swazir zot prop sime, e zot pran plezir dan zot bann abominasion.
66.4: Akoz sa, mo pou fer zot pey konsekans, e mo pou fer tom lor zot seki zot pli per. Mo finn apele, e personn pa finn reponn. Mo finn koze, me zot, zot pa finn tande. Zot finn fer seki depler mwa. Seki pa fer mwa plezir la, samem zot finn swazire.
66.5: Ekout seki LESEGNER pe dir, zot ki ena respe pou so parol. Zot prop frer pe deteste zot, e pe rezet zot akoz mwa. Zot pe sikane e zot pe dir: “Ki LESEGNER montre zot so laglwar, pouki nou trouv zot lazwa,” me sa bann lamem ki pou gagn onte.
66.6: Tande, enn tapaz ki sort dan lavil, enn lavwa ki sort dan tanp, samem lavwa LESEGNER. Li pe donn so bann lennmi zot kantite. LESEGNER dir: “Momem LESEGNER, pena personn kouma mwa.”
66.7: Avan ki li gagn douler, li fini akouse. Avan ki li soufer, li finn donn nesans enn ti garson.
66.8: Kisannla finn tann enn kiksoz koumsa? Kisannla finn trouv bann kiksoz koumsa? Eski enn pei finn deza ne dan enn zour? Eski enn pep kapav pran nesans enn sel kou? pourtan avan mem li koumans gagn douler lakousman, Sion finn akous enn garson?
66.9: “Si mo finn les enn mama sarye so zanfan an so vant pandan nef mwa, eski mo pou anpes li akouse?” LESEGNER pe dir. “Mwa ki donn nesans, eski mo pou anpes lavi-la vini?” To bondie pe dir.
66.10: Manifeste lazwa avek Zerizalem, exprim zot kontantman pou li, zot tou ki kontan li. Manifeste kontantman avek li, enn boner pou zot tou, ki ti an-dey akoz li.
66.11: Ki zot tet dile e ki zot rasazie ar sa dile ki donn konsolasion-la. Ki zot tete e ki zot apresie so bienfe kouma ti baba bwar dile so mama.
66.12: Ala LESEGNER finn koze: “Ala mo pe fer prosperite koul kot twa kouma enn larivier, e rises bann nasion, kouma enn toran ki pe deborde. Pou donn zot dile, pou port zot lor laans, met zot lor zenou, e kares zot.
66.13: Kouma enn mama konsol so zanfan koumsamem, mwa mo pou konsol zot. Dan Zerizalem, zot pou gagn konsolasion.
66.14: Zot pou trouve e zot leker pou dan lazwa. Zot lezo pou regagn lavi kouma lerb ver. LESEGNER pou manifeste so pwisans pou so bann serviter, me so bann lennmi ava trouv so koler.
66.15: Ala LESEGNER pe vini dan dife. So bann saryo, zot kouma siklonn. Li pou fer zot peye ar so koler terib, e li pou menas zot ar laflam so dife.
66.16: Avek dife, LESEGNER pou ziz tou bann imin, e ar so lepe li pou pini zot. Boukou pou mor.
66.17: Bann ki konsakre zot, bann ki pirifie zot, pou rant dan enn zardin, zot dibout deryer kikenn ki dan sant. Sa bann la, zot manz pork ek lera, kiksoz degoutan. Zot tou, zot pou mor ansam. LESEGNER deklare.
66.18: Mwa, mo konn zot bann aksion e zot bann panse. Mo pe vinn rasanble tou bann nasion ek tou bann pep. Zot tou pou trouv mo laglwar.
66.19: Mo pou met enn sign kot zot, e mo pou pran parmi zot bann reskape pou anvoy zot dan bann pei: Kot Tarsis, Pit, Lid, Mesek, Toubal ek Yavann, kot bann zil ki bien lwin, ki pa finn tann koz mwa, e ki pa finn trouv mo laglwar. Zot pou fer bann pei konn mo laglwar.
66.20: E depi tou bann pei, zot pou ramenn tou zot bann frer kouma enn lofrand pou LESEGNER; avek bann souval, bann saryo, bann bourik, bann samo, kot mo montagn sin, Zerizalem. LESEGNER pe dir. Zot pou kouma bann garson Izrael ki amenn lofrand dan enn vaz pir kot lakaz LESEGNER.
66.21: Parmi zot, mo pou pran enn bann pou vinn pret ek Levit. LESEGNER pe dir.
66.22: Parey kouma nouvo lesiel ek nouvo later ki mwa, mo pe fer e ki pe res solid divan mwa, LESEGNER deklare, parey zot desandans e zot nom pou res ferm divan mwa.
66.23: Nouvel linn apre nouvel linn, saba apre saba, tou dimoun pou prosterne divan mwa. LESEGNER finn dir.
66.24: Zot pou sorti, e zot pou trouv kadav bann dimoun ki ti revolte kont mwa. Lever ki pe manz zot, zame pa pou mor, e dife ki pe bril zot, zame pa pou tengn. Zot pou enn abominasion pou tou dimoun lor later.
